title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute
jsonLd.description:
Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Aurangabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute:
Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute!
